trans-unit.source: Leave empty to inherit the value from the extension configuration. Set it to override that default for this site.
Either "sandbox" (PayPal's developer test environment) or "production". Leave empty to inherit the extension configuration.
Overrides the client secret for this site. Prefer referencing an environment variable so the secret stays out of version control. Leave empty to inherit the extension configuration.
The id of the PayPal webhook whose signature incoming notifications are verified against. Required for webhook confirmation; leave empty to rely on the browser return only.
Shown to the customer on the PayPal approval page. Leave empty to use the PayPal account default.
Send the PayPal calls to this host instead of the real PayPal host, e.g. a proxy or a local mock server. Leave empty to use the environment's real host.
